prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约3657名→8280名→11927名→8399名→5529名，整体呈先降后升的V型走势，2023年触底后连续两年回升，2025年较2024年前移约 2870名，回升势头明显；该校在吉林省物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为6人，2024年增至9人，2025年增至10人；2026年计划为9人，较2025年缩招1人， 小幅减少招生名额，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南财经政法大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第65名→2022年第66名→2023年第6 7名→2024年第71名→2025年第62名→2026年第57名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力与认可度增强；2025年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（教 授考核争议），但事件影响范围有限；抖音学校热度总排名第73位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，法学获 评A级，应用经济学获评A-级，法学为该校王牌学科，对物理类考生报考法学类也有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度为推荐（偏热），金融/财经/经济类 为分化观望，会计/财务/审计为推荐；吉林省2026年高考总人数约110868人，较2025年总人数111492人略有下降，按近年比例估算物理类约7.99万人，考生规模基本稳定，2025年物理类本科批340分，特殊类型招生控制线479分。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升的强势走势、2026年招生计 划小幅缩招（10→9人）、软科排名持续上升（第62→57名）以及法学、会计学等优势专业对物理类考生的吸引力，预计2026年物理类竞争在2025年回升基础上进一步加剧；预测最 低位次约5117名，区间4617–5617名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学类（法学、民商法方向等）
- 会计学（会计学、注册会计师、财管）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 财政学类（财政学、税收学）
- 金融数学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 金融学类（金融学、投资学）
- 劳动关系。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4617–5617名内，建议以二档（财政学类、金融数学）为主力报考，一档（法学类、会计学）作为冲刺目标，三档（金融学类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间 下限（<4617名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3657 → 8280 → 11927 → 8399 → 5529, showing an overall V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing, bottoming out in 2023 and recovering for two consecutive years, with a forward shift of about 2870 places in 2025 compared to 2024, indicating a clear recovery momentum; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 6 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 9 in 2024, and to 10 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 9 students, a reduction of 1 student compared to 2025, slightly decreasing enrollment quotas, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years: 65th in 2021 → 66th in 2022 → 67th in 2023 → 71st in 2024 → 62nd in 2025 → 57th in 2026, with a steady improvement in ranking, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition; the reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was slightly negative, mainly involving a teacher ethics incident (professor assessment controversy), but the impact of the incident was limited; the overall popularity ranking on Douyin (TikTok) was 73rd, rated as average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms; no obvious record of admission cut-off gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, law was rated A-level, applied economics was rated A- level, with law being the university's flagship discipline, which also has strong appeal for Physics Category candidates applying to law-related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of law majors is recommended (relatively hot), finance/banking/economics is in a state of divergence and wait-and-see, accounting/finance/auditing is recommended; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Jilin Province is approximately 110,868, a slight decrease from the total of 111,492 in 2025, with an estimated Physics Category of about 79,900 based on recent proportions, indicating a basically stable candidate pool; in 2025, the undergraduate batch score for Physics Category was 340 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 479 points.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend in rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (10→9 students), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (62nd→57th), and the appeal of advantageous majors such as law and accounting to Physics Category candidates, it is expected that competition in the Physics Category in 2026 will further intensify based on the recovery in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5117, with a range of 4617–5617.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law (Law, Civil and Commercial Law Direction, etc.)
- Accounting (Accounting, Certified Public Accountant, Financial Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Finance (Public Finance, Taxation)
- Financial Mathematics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Finance (Finance, Investment)
- Labor Relations.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4617–5617, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Finance, Financial Mathematics) as the main choice, with Tier 1 (Law, Accounting) as a reach goal, and Tier 3 (Finance) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4617), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1086 → 2730 → 1627 → 1493 → 627, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), reaching the highest level in 2025 at 627, a significant advance of about 866 places compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jilin Province was 10 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 12 in 2024, and reduced back to 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 10 students, a reduction of 1 student from 2025, slightly decreasing enrollment quotas, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science University Ranking has been steadily rising in recent years: 65th in 2021 → 66th in 2022 → 67th in 2023 → 71st in 2024 → 62nd in 2025 → 57th in 2026, with a steadily improving ranking, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; the reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was slightly negative, mainly involving a teacher ethics incident (professor assessment controversy), but the impact was limited; the university's Douyin popularity total ranking is 73rd, rated as average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms; no obvious record of admission gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, law was rated A-level, applied economics was rated A- level, with law being the university's flagship discipline, having significant advantages among finance, economics, and law institutions, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of law major is recommended (slightly hot), while finance/accounting/economics majors are in a state of differentiation and wait-and-see; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Jilin Province is approximately 110,868, slightly decreasing from 111,492 in 2025, with an estimated History Category of about 30,900 based on recent proportions, indicating a basically stable candidate pool; in 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch score was 384 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 493 points.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend of rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026 (11 to 10 students), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (62nd to 57th), and the sustained attraction of advantageous disciplines like law to candidates, it is expected that competition in the History Category in 2026 will further intensify based on the high level of 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 578, with a range of 474 to 682.
